case_title: REDDICKS, JOYCE ANN VS TROWERN, STEVEN et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY REDDICKS, JOYCE ANN AS TO DEFENDANT TROWERN, STEVEN LEHMAN BROTHERS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REDDICKS, JOYCE ANN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEHMAN BROTHERS INC. STEVEN TROWERN IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AND IS REPLACED BY LEHMAN BROTHERS INC AS DEFT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
